# Scoring notes

Gold source: gpt-5.4 prod blog benchmark run.

Evaluate against:

- Live baseline similarity without copying low-quality formatting mistakes.
- Brief compliance, including TLDR, reading time, FAQ section, meta title, meta description and excerpt.
- No em dashes or en dashes.
- Australian English spelling.
- SEO/topic authority and keyword coverage.
- Commercial usefulness for Optimise Digital's target customers.
- Direct CMS paste readiness with minimal editing.
